Added Siddhant Kumar Thakur to contributors
prs.body:
## Overview
This PR completely overhauls the frontend UI to establish a premium, production-grade corporate intelligence aesthetic. It transitions the platform from a standard chat interface into a highly interactive, animated Knowledge Dashboard.

## Key Additions
- **Visual Identity:** Integrated a custom AI-designed neo-brain logo with dark-mode specific styling.
- **Cinematic Animations:** Added `framer-motion` for fluid page transitions, slow-mo background drifting effects, and staggered entry loading.
- **Interactive Empty State:** Replaced the default blank chat with a gorgeous "Welcome" dashboard featuring 4 functional "Quick Action" suggestion cards.
- **Context Panel:** Built a persistent Desktop Right-Hand panel to display active models (Gemini 1.5, Embeddings) and currently indexed SOP documents.
- **UX Polish:** Added a "Try asking" scrolling suggestion bar above the input, a dynamic vector counter in the header, and an interactive radar-ping animation for document drag-and-drop.
- **Bug Fixes:** Removed aggressive global CSS resets that were breaking glassmorphic overlays.

## Testing
- Verify all `framer-motion` animations trigger smoothly.
- Ensure the right-hand context panel is hidden on mobile but renders correctly on `xl` viewports.
- Confirm standard routing between Landing, Chat, and Admin views functions without flickering.

prs.title: Made the neon glow intensity little lower for texts and cardbox. Also made the the light theme background white.
Enhance Python Utilities: Number Guessing Game & Linked List Cycle Detection.
prs.body:
This PR introduces improvements and new features in two Python scripts:

1) Number Guessing Game:

I) Added difficulty levels (Easy, Medium, Hard) with different allowed attempts.

II) Implemented warmer/colder hints to guide the player.

III) Added celebratory effects (ASCII art, emojis) for correct guesses.

IV) Introduced replay option for multiple rounds.

V) improved user prompts and feedback for a better interactive experience.

2) Linked List Cycle Detection:

I) Fixed errors in the original cycle detection code.

II) Added proper has_cycle method to check for cycles in a linked list.

III) Enhanced code readability and structure for easier maintenance.

These changes improve the functionality, usability, and interactivity of the Python scripts, making them more robust and user-friendly.

prs.title: Enhance UI with Cyberpunk Neon Theme and Animated Effects
prs.body:
This pull request introduces a visually appealing cyberpunk-inspired design to the Contributors page, enhancing the user experience with the following improvements:

1) Changes Made:

I) Background: Added an animated neon gradient background for a futuristic cyberpunk look.

II) Cards: Subtle glow effects on hover with smooth scaling and shadow enhancements.

III) Avatars: Neon glow effect when hovered for interactive visual feedback.

IV) Buttons & Links: Added neon hover glow effects for GitHub links, website links, and theme toggle button.

V) Text: Titles and names now have a soft neon glow, improving readability and aesthetic appeal.

VI) Dark/Light Mode: Retained the existing theme toggle functionality with neon enhancements.

Overall UI: Maintained original structure and functionality without removing any existing code.

2) Impact:

I) Gives the website a modern, professional cyberpunk feel.

II) Improves user engagement with interactive hover effects.

III) Compatible with both dark and light themes.

prs.title: Enhance Website Theme: Neon Dark Mode & Premium Cursor
prs.body:
This PR updates the website’s visual design to a modern, professional neon-dark theme while preserving all existing functionality and layout. The following changes have been made:

1) Neon Dark Background:

I) Applied a dark radial-gradient background with neon highlights for a professional, modern look.

II) Cards now have a subtle neon glow to enhance visual hierarchy.

2) Text & Card Styling:

I) Updated primary and secondary text colors for better contrast against dark backgrounds.

II) Added neon glow effects to card titles and descriptions for a stylish appearance.

3) Buttons:

I) Buttons now feature neon gradient backgrounds with glowing hover effects for interactivity.

4)  Premium Cursor:

I) Customized cursor with neon dot and outline for a high-end, modern feel.

II) Maintained Original Structure:

III) No changes were made to the HTML structure or JS functionality.

IV) All original layouts, animations, and content remain intact.

This enhancement significantly improves the website’s visual appeal and professionalism while keeping the user experience consistent.

prs.title: Fix services.html layout and styling, update colors and responsiveness.
prs.body:
This pull request addresses layout and styling issues in services.html and aligns the page with NELTY LLC’s branding guidelines. Key updates include:

(*)Changes Made:

I) Navigation Bar

II) Updated styling for consistent dark purple branding (#6a0dad).

III) mproved hover effects with light purple (#d8b3ff).

IV) Responsive hamburger menu for mobile devices.

V) Service Cards

VI) Fixed sizing and spacing for uniform appearance.

VII) Added subtle hover effect with transform and shadow.

VIII) Ensured mobile-friendly stacked layout.

IX) Forms (Payment & Appointment)

X) Standardized white background with shadows and rounded corners.

XI) Styled inputs and select fields for consistent typography.

XII) Buttons now use brand colors with hover effect (#6a0dad → #4e008e).

XIII) Back to Top Button

XIV) Consistent styling with brand colors and smooth hover effect.

XV) Footer

XVI) Updated styling for alignment with site-wide color scheme.

XVII) Responsive Design

XVIII) Mobile breakpoint at 768px.

XIX) Navigation collapses into vertical menu.

XX) Service cards stack for smaller screens.

(*)Benefits:

I) Restores layout consistency for services.html.

II) Improves UX across desktop and mobile.

III) Ensures cohesive brand identity and modern look.

Improved css and js
prs.body:
This pull request introduces a significant update to the KBC quiz project with the following improvements:

1. Quiz Functionality Enhancements:

I)Added a larger question pool with 10 questions per difficulty (Easy, Medium, Hard).

II)Implemented a per-difficulty timer:

Easy: 30s

Medium: 20s

Hard: 12s

IV)Filtered questions based on the selected difficulty.

V)Updated prize calculation logic and prize ladder highlight.

VI)Added option button feedback for correct and incorrect answers.

VII)Automatic transition to next question or game over when time runs out or wrong answer is selected.

2. UI & UX Improvements:

I)Glowing animation on the current prize ladder item.

II)Flashing animations for correct/incorrect options.

III)Smooth transitions between questions.

IV)Dynamic points display with animation.

3. Code Improvements:

I)Cleaned up timer logic to use per-game questionTime.

II)Refactored code for easier readability and maintainability.

III)Added CSS animations dynamically through JS for glow and feedback effects.

4. Compatibility:

i) Fully compatible with the existing HTML and CSS structure.

ii) Works with the difficulty selection buttons and dynamic question pool.

(*)Impact:

i) Makes the quiz experience closer to the official KBC feel.

ii) Enhances interactivity and user engagement.

iii) Provides flexibility for future UI/UX improvements.

prs.body: ## Feature / Enhancement Added a **dynamic button collection** with: - 10+ animated, interactive buttons - Font Awesome icons integrated for each button - Micro-animations: bounce, rotate, tilt, shimmer - Ripple effect on click - Dark/Light theme toggle with localStorage support - Random gradient backgrounds on page load - Fully responsive layout for mobile & desktop - Accessibility improvements with aria-labels This PR enhances UI/UX and provides a ready-to-use interactive component library. --- ### Preview / Demo Include screenshots or GIFs of buttons in action here. --- ### Checklist - [x] Buttons functional & responsive - [x] Animations smooth - [x] Theme toggle works - [x] Code formatted & commented - [x] README updated

issues.title: Add Timer, Auto Shutdown, and AI Assistant to MeTube ✅

type.name: Feature
type.description: A request, idea, or new functionality

issues.body:
🕒 1. Video Timer

Purpose: Allow users to set a custom watch timer.
Functionality:

User sets a duration (e.g., 15, 30, or 60 minutes).

When the timer ends, playback automatically pauses or stops.

Optional notification (sound or popup) before stopping.

Benefit: Helps users manage their screen time and avoid binge-watching.

🔌 2. Auto Shutdown

Purpose: Let MeTube close automatically after a certain duration.
Functionality:

Works with the timer — after the timer ends, MeTube either closes or puts the system to sleep/shuts down (optional).

Perfect for users who fall asleep watching videos or forget to close the app.

Benefit: Saves power and provides a convenient hands-free experience.

🤖 3. Built-in AI Assistant

Purpose: Make MeTube smarter and more helpful without compromising simplicity.
AI Features Could Include:

Summarize video content or comments.

Suggest related videos intelligently.

Generate transcripts or short Q&A summaries.

Benefit: Adds intelligent assistance while keeping the minimal interface.

⚙️ Implementation Suggestion

Add a new "Tools" or "Smart Features" section in the UI settings for these options. Keep the design consistent with MeTube’s clean, distraction-free layout.
